author: g5n-dev
title: Arbitrary Code Execution via Malicious User Plugins
notes: The vulnerability in discovery.py:95-106 (auto-loading user plugins without consent/sandboxing) is real and well-described. However, this is a duplicate of S120 (@optimus-fulcria, 2026-03-05T10:10:19Z) which reported the exact same issue — same file, same code lines, same vulnerability class — nearly 22 hours earlier. S126 (@TSECP) and S146 (@tianshanclaw) also pre-date this submission with the same finding.
